title: dryopteris ampla var. subdryopteris
intro: Dryopteris ampla var. subdryopteris, a variety of the Dryopteris ampla fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris ampla var. subdryopteris include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
